creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for the new port Daniel.

Can you confirm the changes pass QA (portlint, and poudriere) please

Couple of review items:

 - Add LICENSE_FILE if one is provided in the distfiles
 - Use USE_CSTD for setting -std
 - Try to resolve build/link failures without requiring -fcommon, and report upstream if possible
 - Group and sort USES/USE_*
